scene: A wide horizontal decorative frieze carved from {{material}}, featuring a central stylized {{centerpiece_type}} surrounded by intricate ornamental carvings inspired by {{theme_name}} motifs. The entire surface fills the canvas edge-to-edge with sharp 90-degree corners.

subjects.size: small to medium, occupying no more than 30% of the tile height
subjects.interaction: a subtle focal accent, not dominating the surface

subjects.description: {{theme_name}}-inspired scrollwork blended with {{motifs_short}} patterns and geometric decorative elements
subjects.interaction: forming an elaborate border and filling the horizontal space around the central {{centerpiece_type}}

style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, high-contrast graphic style with engraved relief detailing

color_palette.note: Mid-grey tones only. No near-white highlights. Color is applied programmatically after generation.

lighting: simple two-tone cel shading with highlight on upper-left and shadow on lower-right, subtle embossing for carved depth

background.details: NO background layer. The solid {{material}} surface occupies 100% of the canvas.

composition: wide horizontal banner layout with strict bilateral symmetry centered on the {{centerpiece_type}}, ornamental side panels balanced on both ends, the surface fills every edge of the canvas

camera.focus: uniform sharp focus across entire frieze

medium: digital vector-style illustration with subtle engraved relief overlay
textures: subtle flat {{material}} grain in neutral warm grey
engraved linework texture for carved details
subtle surface wear to imply age and authenticity
details: the {{material}} surface fills 100% of the canvas — sharp corners, no rounded edges, no gaps
{{centerpiece_type}} centered as the dominant focal element
all colors are mid-tone warm grey — no near-white, no bright highlights, darkest grey for shadows
the brightest pixel must be medium grey #A8A098, never white or near-white
NO saturated hue — only neutral grey tones with good luminance contrast
bold outer frame border integrated into the surface edges
effects: surface-integrated vignette using multiply shading at edges
soft inner shadow embossing on carved elements
continuous pattern flow across full width
usage_notes: This is a master tile generated in neutral grey. It will be cropped to 4 sizes and tinted programmatically. Maintain strong symmetry and clear central hierarchy. Good luminance contrast is critical for rich tinting results.
